description: Optimized 'Is Airbnb Legal in Melaka' blog metadata and intro to match high-intent queries and add authority signals (700+ properties). Based on Jay Abraham's principles of specific scale signals to build trust.

change.new_desc: YES — Airbnb is legal in Melaka in 2026. iHousing manages 700+ properties here. No minimum stay, no state ban, no license required yet. Learn MOTAC rules & condo laws.
change.rationale: Even with a good CTR, this high-intent page can perform better by leading with authority. Adding 'iHousing manages 700+ properties' to the meta description creates high-fidelity trust for potential investors/hosts searching for legal clarity.

description: Expanded the MOTAC license guide with a property-specific compliance section (Commercial vs Residential vs Heritage). Aimed at improving relevance for 'property-specific' legal queries and increasing dwell time.

change.content_added: Segmented compliance advice for Commercial Condos, Residential Condos, Heritage Shophouses, and Landed Properties.
change.rationale: Following the principle of 'Depth Over Breadth'. High-intent searchers aren't just looking for general legality; they want to know if THEIR specific property type (e.g., heritage shophouse) is safe. This expansion increases E-E-A-T and target query relevance.

description: Optimized 'MOTAC License for Airbnb Malaysia' blog headline. Front-loaded exact high-volume keyword and added year '2026' for freshness. Targeted regulatory-seeking hosts to increase CTR.
